'''鈭歳-dh-n''' ('''radhana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monarchise|monarchise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monarchise|monarchise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-dh-n
|-
! Lemma
| radhana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:radhanithi|radhanithi]] || [[word:radhaniji|radhaniji]] || [[word:radhanishi|radhanishi]] || [[word:radhani|radhani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhanuthuth|radhanuthuth]] || [[word:radhanujuj|radhanujuj]] || [[word:radhanushush|radhanushush]] || [[word:radhan|radhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhanuthu|radhanuthu]] || [[word:radhanuju|radhanuju]] || [[word:radhanushu|radhanushu]] || [[word:radhanu|radhanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhanufuth|radhanufuth]] || [[word:radhanufuj|radhanufuj]] || [[word:radhanufush|radhanufush]] || [[word:radhanuf|radhanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:radhanethe|radhanethe]] || [[word:radhaneje|radhaneje]] || [[word:radhaneshe|radhaneshe]] || [[word:radhane|radhane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhanothoth|radhanothoth]] || [[word:radhanojoj|radhanojoj]] || [[word:radhanoshosh|radhanoshosh]] || [[word:radhan|radhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhanotho|radhanotho]] || [[word:radhanojo|radhanojo]] || [[word:radhanosho|radhanosho]] || [[word:radhano|radhano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhanofoth|radhanofoth]] || [[word:radhanofoj|radhanofoj]] || [[word:radhanofosh|radhanofosh]] || [[word:radhanof|radhanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:radhan忙th忙|radhan忙th忙]] || [[word:radhan忙j忙|radhan忙j忙]] || [[word:radhan忙sh忙|radhan忙sh忙]] || [[word:radhan忙|radhan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhanathath|radhanathath]] || [[word:radhanajaj|radhanajaj]] || [[word:radhanashash|radhanashash]] || [[word:radhan|radhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhanatha|radhanatha]] || [[word:radhanaja|radhanaja]] || [[word:radhanasha|radhanasha]] || [[word:radhana|radhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhanafath|radhanafath]] || [[word:radhanafaj|radhanafaj]] || [[word:radhanafash|radhanafash]] || [[word:radhanaf|radhanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:radhanasha|radhanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goradhanasha|goradhanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiradhanasha|gokiradhanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:radhan眉sha|radhan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goradhankn眉sha|goradhankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhan眉sha|gokiradhan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:radhansh毛sha|radhansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goradhanksh毛sha|goradhanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiradhansh毛sha|gokiradhansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhanrosha|radhanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhankrosha|goradhankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhanrosha|gokiradhanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:radhanmusha|radhanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhankmusha|goradhankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhanmusha|gokiradhanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:radhansherasha|radhansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goradhanksherasha|goradhanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiradhansherasha|gokiradhansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:radhangasha|radhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goradhankngasha|goradhankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiradhangasha|gokiradhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:radhanyasha|radhanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goradhankyasha|goradhankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiradhanyasha|gokiradhanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:radhanyamasha|radhanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goradhankyamasha|goradhankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiradhanyamasha|gokiradhanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:radhan眉sh毛sha|radhan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goradhankn眉sh毛sha|goradhankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiradhan眉sh毛sha|gokiradhan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhan眉rosha|radhan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhankn眉rosha|goradhankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhan眉rosha|gokiradhan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhan眉musha|radhan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhankn眉musha|goradhankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhan眉musha|gokiradhan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:radhansh毛n眉sha|radhansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goradhanksh毛n眉sha|goradhanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhansh毛n眉sha|gokiradhansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhansh毛rosha|radhansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhanksh毛rosha|goradhanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhansh毛rosha|gokiradhansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhansh毛musha|radhansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhanksh毛musha|goradhanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhansh毛musha|gokiradhansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:radhanron眉sha|radhanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goradhankron眉sha|goradhankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhanron眉sha|gokiradhanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:radhanrosh毛sha|radhanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goradhankrosh毛sha|goradhankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiradhanrosh毛sha|gokiradhanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:radhanromusha|radhanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goradhankromusha|goradhankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiradhanromusha|gokiradhanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:radhanmun眉sha|radhanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goradhankmun眉sha|goradhankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiradhanmun眉sha|gokiradhanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:radhanmush毛sha|radhanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goradhankmush毛sha|goradhankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiradhanmush毛sha|gokiradhanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:radhanmurosha|radhanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goradhankmurosha|goradhankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiradhanmurosha|gokiradhanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:radhan|radhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙dh忙n|r忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horadhan|horadhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙dh忙n|hor忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoradhan|hohoradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙dh忙n|hohor忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉radhan|n眉radhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙dh忙n|n眉r忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉radhan|n眉n眉radhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙dh忙n|n眉n眉r忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂radhan|n茂radhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙dh忙n|n茂r忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂radhan|n茂n茂radhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙dh忙n|n茂n茂r忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luradhan|luradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙dh忙n|lur忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluradhan|luluradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙dh忙n|lulur忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liradhan|liradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙dh忙n|lir忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliradhan|liliradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙dh忙n|lilir忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koradhan|koradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙dh忙n|kor忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoradhan|kokoradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙dh忙n|kokor忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keradhan|keradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙dh忙n|ker忙dh忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeradhan|kekeradhan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙dh忙n|keker忙dh忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
